title: Zustand store for managing session subscriptions with localStorage persistence
purpose: Maintains a store of subscribed sessions with their statuses and persists the data to localStorage. Provides methods to subscribe, unsubscribe, reorder, and update session statuses.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store named useSubscriptionStore that manages session subscriptions with localStorage persistence. The store initializes from localStorage and updates it on every change.

steps.content: Generate a unique key from the project and session identifiers.
Create a new subscription entry with unknown status and current timestamp.
Update the subscriptions map with the new entry.
Add the key to the order array if it's not already present.
Persist the updated subscriptions map to localStorage.
Persist the updated order array to localStorage.
Update the store state with the new subscriptions and order.
Create a copy of the current subscriptions map.
Remove the subscription entry corresponding to the provided key.
Filter the order array to exclude the key.
Persist the updated subscriptions map to localStorage.
Persist the updated order array to localStorage.
Update the store state with the new subscriptions and order.
Persist the new order array to localStorage.
Update the store state with the new order.

methods.name: updateStatus
methods.normalized_params: (claudeSessionId: string, status: string, project: string, session: string): void

steps.content: Generate a unique key from the project and session identifiers.
Look up the existing subscription entry for the key.
IF no existing entry is found, return the current state unchanged.
Determine if the status group has changed between active and non-active states.
IF the status group has changed, update the lastUpdate timestamp to current time.
ELSE keep the existing lastUpdate timestamp.
Update the subscription entry with the new status and potentially updated timestamp.
Persist the updated subscriptions map to localStorage.
Update the store state with the new subscriptions.
